name: Thymely Marinated Lingcod
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and marinate lingcod for 30 minutes.
2. Broil or barbecue until the fish flakes when tested with a fork.
3. Makes 8 servings.
4. Substitutes: cod, halibut, orange roughy
5. This was incredibly good!!
6. Entered into MasterCook and tested for you by Reggie & Jeff Dwork.
